untranslatable_reason: Intraday momentum divergence detection requires comparison of price action across multiple bars and momentum indicators in a way that cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The signal also references 'stock index' asset class filtering which is not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated directional move threshold as close deviation from sma_20 by ±2% (0.02 in decimal scale). Volume confirmation uses vol_ratio_20. Exit conditions simplified to mean reversion at moving average. Momentum divergence condition marked untranslatable as it requires multi-bar pattern recognition. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on directional move direction.
